channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitcoin bulls target $115K by December: Does data back the expectation?
item.description: Bitcoin options show bulls targeting $115,000 by year-end but are traders becoming overly optimistic?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: US Treasury ‘privately demanded’ Binance comply with monitoring deal: Report
item.description: US Treasury officials reportedly sent a letter to Binance pressing the crypto exchange on compliance with a 2023 deal, after reports circulated that the company had facilitated transactions linked to Iran.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: CLARITY Act markup could happen as early as next week: Coinbase exec
item.description: The provisions in the crypto market structure bill are still under review by the banking and crypto lobbies as a new poll shows bipartisan voter support for the legislation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Crypto PACs spend $7.2M to support candidates in 5 US states ahead of elections
item.description: Two affiliates of the crypto-backed PAC Fairshake reported media buys for political candidates in Georgia, Alabama, Nebraska, Kentucky and Texas this week.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Fund managers double down on Bitcoin as crypto sentiment rebounds — CoinShares
item.description: Institutional investors are gradually increasing crypto exposure as Bitcoin leads allocation preferences amid rising fund inflows and improving market sentiment.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Bitcoin falls under $80K but four-month high in weekly BTC ETF inflows may curb selling
item.description: Bitcoin hit resistance at $82,800, triggering a drop below $80,000, but a $1.105 billion weekly inflow into spot BTC ETFs could slow sellers.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Kalshi see valuation double to $22B after $1B raise as prediction markets boom
item.description: Fresh capital from top Wall Street and Silicon Valley firms signals increasing confidence in regulated event trading and retail prediction markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Samson Mow defends Strategy selling portions of its Bitcoin treasury
item.description: The Bitcoin advocate spoke up after Michael Saylor signaled that the company might sell some BTC, a major departure from the Strategy founder's previous rhetoric.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Vince Quill

item.title: Crypto Polo Cup returns for its fourth edition in Palm Beach during Consensus Miami week
item.description: Hosted by Luna PR, the fourth edition of the Crypto Polo Cup (CPC) will take place on May 9, 2026, at the Santa Clara Polo Club, alongside Consensus Miami.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Cointelegraph

item.title: Panther Protocol deploys privacy infrastructure on Polygon
item.description: After years of research, engineering, and community collaboration, Panther Protocol Foundation announced that Panther Protocol is now live on Polygon.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Germany weighs 2027 crypto tax overhaul as one-year holding rule under threat
item.description: Germany may overhaul its crypto tax rules from 2027, potentially curbing the country’s hallmark one-year tax-free holding rule as it tightens enforcement and seeks extra revenue.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Arbitrum vote to release $71M in frozen Kelp exploit ETH set to pass
item.description: The Snapshot vote would move the recovery effort toward a binding onchain Arbitrum governance proposal.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Kraken parent Payward to buy Reap in $600M stablecoin payments push
item.description: Kraken parent Payward agreed to buy Hong Kong-based Reap for up to $600 million, adding card issuance and stablecoin payment capabilities to its new B2B platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Polygon reduces block time to 1.75 seconds as payments push accelerates
item.description: Polygon delivered its first block time reduction upgrade since genesis, as the network seeks to position for more high-frequency applications such as private stablecoin payments.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: XRP 'probably going to $12' as price holds historical bottom zone for months
item.description: XRP is retesting a key multi-year support zone that has historically preceded major rebounds, with analysts predicting a rally toward $12 if the level holds.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: South Korea confirms 22% crypto tax starting January 2027: Report
item.description: South Korea’s Finance Ministry has reportedly confirmed for the first time that a 22% tax on crypto gains will proceed as scheduled in January 2027.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Core Scientific posts $347M loss as AI hosting overtakes Bitcoin mining
item.description: Core Scientific mined 279 BTC in the quarter, down 45% from a year earlier, while its colocation business became its top revenue source.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: VanEck’s Sigel sees Bitcoin reaching $1M within five years
item.description: VanEck’s Matthew Sigel says Bitcoin may reach $1 million in five years, comparing adoption trends to the video game industry’s shift to mainstream use.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Bitcoin analysts say this level must break for BTC price to confirm bottom
item.description: A slowdown in profit-taking and reclaiming $88,000 as support are prerequisites for BTC to confirm cycle bottom.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: California man jailed for 78 months over $250M crypto theft conspiracy
item.description: Marlon Ferro, aka “GothFerrari,” broke into victims’ homes to steal hardware wallets when his co-conspirators couldn’t hack them remotely.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitcoin Bollinger Bands push key breakout as creator acts on positive signal
item.description: A new Bitcoin Bollinger Bands breakout attempt on the daily chart drew mixed reactions as the metric's creator, John Bollinger, revealed a fresh BTC position.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: Changelly report highlights growing stablecoin use in everyday spending ahead of May 15 infrastructure discussion
item.description: Changelly uncovers the main stablecoin trends for 2026, and hosts a podcast with Stablerail on stablecoin infrastructure every business must build on May 15, 2026.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: TrustedVolumes hit by $6.7M exploit as 1inch denies breach
item.description: 1inch said its protocols, infrastructure and user funds were not affected by the exploit targeting independent resolver TrustedVolumes.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Ezra Reguerra

item.title: BNY eyes institutional Bitcoin, Ethereum custody for investors in UAE
item.description: BNY is partnering with Finstreet and ADI Foundation to offer regulated Bitcoin and Ethereum custody to UAE clients from the Abu Dhabi Global Market.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Luffa unveils major brand upgrade: Repositioned as AI × Web3 Super Connector
item.description: Luffa, the global leader in intelligent ecosystem platforms, today officially announced a major brand upgrade, repositioning itself as the AI × Web3 Super Connector.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Bithumb enters Vietnam crypto license race with SSI Digital deal
item.description: Bithumb’s tie-up with SSI Digital positions it for Vietnam’s strict crypto exchange pilot as competition for scarce licenses heats up and scrutiny mounts at home.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Christina Comben

item.title: Quantum attacks could worsen without proof of ownership: Near One
item.description: Near One says blockchains may need new ownership verification systems if quantum attacks compromise wallet keys and expose private assets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Samourai Wallet co-founder appeals for donations to pay $2M legal fees
item.description: Samourai Wallet co-founder Keonne Rodriguez said mounting legal debt and fading pardon hopes could force him to serve his full prison sentence.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Trump-linked American Bitcoin reports $82M Q1 loss, revenue miss
item.description: Donald Trump’s sons’ company, American Bitcoin, missed analyst revenue estimates and posted narrower losses as it ramped up its mining capacity.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan
